data.name: Luck of the Draw
data.detailed_description:
Step into the glowing lights of a neon pub and test your luck in Luck of the Draw, an unpredictable card battle where every draw matters.

The rules are simple—but victory is anything but.

Players take turns drawing and playing cards from a shared deck, each one capable of shifting the balance of the match. Your objective is to give your opponent 5 hearts before they manage to give you 5.

Sounds easy… until the deck starts working against you.

Set on a stylish neon pub stage, each round becomes a tense back-and-forth of risk, timing, and pure luck. One perfect card can be the one to make your opponent cum.

Features

Varied Card Battles
Draw from the deck and play cards that influence the flow of the match.

Heart-Based Win Condition
The first player to lose ALL hearts loses. Pass them to your opponent before they pass them to you.

Neon Pub Atmosphere
Battle on a vibrant stage filled with glowing lights and nightlife energy.

Luck Meets Strategy
Every card draw can flip the outcome of the game.

Quick, Replayable Matches
Short, intense rounds make every game feel different.

In Luck of the Draw, fortune favors the bold… but the deck always has the final say.

data.short_description: Luck of the Draw is a card battle set in a neon pub. Draw from the deck, play the cards wisely, and try to give your opponent 5 hearts before they give them to you. In this chaotic duel of luck and strategy, every card could change the game.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or later
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 11 compatible GPU
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX compatible sound card
